name: Judge.me Product Reviews API
what_it_does: Judge.me product reviews REST API for Shopify and WooCommerce merchants to collect, display, and syndicate product reviews with automated review request emails, rich snippets for SEO, and cross-shop review sharing network. Enables AI agents to manage review request email automation for post-purchase review collection, handle review moderation and reply management for customer engagement automation, access rich snippet and Google Shopping feed generation for SEO and search visibility automation, retrieve review widget display configuration for storefront social proof automation, manage cross-shop review sharing through Judge.me network for review bootstrapping automation, handle photo and video review collection for visual UGC automation, access review import from other platforms for migration automation, retrieve store reputation metrics and analytics for brand monitoring automation, manage question and answer section for product FAQ automation, and integrate Judge.me with Shopify, WooCommerce, Klaviyo, Mailchimp, and marketing platforms for end-to-end social proof automation.
use_cases: Collecting reviews from post-purchase request automation agents
Generating SEO rich snippets from review schema agents
Sharing reviews across stores from merchant network agents
Importing reviews from platform migration agents
not_for: B2B enterprise reviews and vendor ratings (use G2 or Trustpilot)
Service business reviews without e-commerce product (use Podium)
Complex rights-managed UGC content (use Emplifi or Bazaarvoice)
best_when: A Shopify or WooCommerce merchant wanting AI agents to automate review collection, SEO rich snippet generation, review import/migration, and cross-shop review network participation through Judge.me's value-priced review platform.
avoid_when: REVIEW NETWORK SHARING REQUIRES CAREFUL BRAND ALIGNMENT: Judge.me's cross-shop review sharing network allows reviews from similar products on other stores to appear on yours; automated review display without filtering network-shared reviews may show competitor brand product reviews on your store; configure network sharing scope carefully in automated review display workflows. RICH SNIPPET VALIDATION AFTER REVIEW IMPORT: Rich snippet schema for imported reviews must reflect original review date and source; automated review import for SEO purposes must preserve original review metadata for schema compliance; auto-generated schema with incorrect dates or sources creates Google structured data validation errors affecting SEO. FREE PLAN API RATE LIMITS FOR HIGH-VOLUME AUTOMATION: Judge.me has generous free plan but API rate limits are lower on free tier; high-volume automated review request workflows or migration pipelines may hit rate limits on free plan; evaluate paid plans for high-velocity automation (Awesome plan at $15/month has higher limits).

auth.notes: Judge.me uses API key for integrations. REST API with JSON. Amsterdam, Netherlands HQ. Founded 2015 by Mike Jiang. Bootstrapped, profitable. Platforms: Shopify, WooCommerce. Products: Product reviews, photo/video reviews, Q&A, cross-shop network, SEO rich snippets, Google Shopping feed. Free plan with robust features. Integrations: Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Omnisend, Facebook, Google. GDPR. Serves 600,000+ merchants. Competes with Loox, Yotpo, and Okendo for Shopify/WooCommerce reviews.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free Forever plan (unlimited reviews, basic widgets, standard email templates, Judge.me branding on widgets)
pricing.paid_tiers: Awesome ($15/mo, custom widgets, unlimited cross-shop sharing, review importing); no per-review pricing
pricing.notes: Amsterdam Netherlands. Bootstrapped. Free forever + $15/mo Awesome. No credit card for free. GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; free plan has lower limits than Awesome plan; webhooks for review create, update, and moderation events

known_agent_gotchas: REVIEW PUBLISHED vs PENDING STATUS IN API RESPONSE: Judge.me reviews have published/pending/hidden status; automated review feed integration must filter by published status; automated social proof widgets using raw API data without status filter show unmoderated pending reviews to site visitors

CROSS-SHOP REVIEW SHARING OPT-IN REQUIRED: Judge.me cross-shop review sharing network requires explicit opt-in; automated review bootstrapping for new products using cross-shop network must verify store is opted in; automated review count inflation via cross-shop without opt-in creates zero results rather than importing network reviews

API SHOP IDENTIFIER REQUIRED IN ALL REQUESTS: Judge.me API uses shop-scoped endpoints requiring shop identifier (myshopify domain or internal ID) in request; automated multi-store management must maintain shop identifier registry; automated requests without correct shop identifier create authentication error regardless of valid API key

REVIEW REQUEST EMAIL DOMAIN REPUTATION FOR DELIVERABILITY: Judge.me review request emails sent from shared sending infrastructure; high-volume automated review requests with poor list quality may affect domain reputation; automated review request for all orders including cancelled or unfulfilled orders creates review requests for products never received, damaging email reputation

PHOTO REVIEW PROCESSING AFTER SUBMISSION: Photos submitted with reviews undergo processing (resize, optimization) before API returns processed photo URLs; automated review webhook that immediately fetches photo URLs may encounter processing-in-progress state; implement brief delay or polling for photo URL availability after review submission webhook
agent_readiness.security_notes: Product reviews. GDPR. API key. EU. Customer review and UGC data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Review platform. GDPR. API key. EU. Customer review and UGC data.
